reviews.review_title: Looks and Sounds Great, but Made me Rage
reviews.review_description:
Completely re-doing my review.
My first review, I was really enjoying the game, but I suck at these types of games, and I think that was some of my frustration. I do think this game is good, and worth the buy. I'm looking forward to the improvements the dev is planning to add.

But, the sound track is great. The voice acting is the best I've heard on the Go. I love the art. Game play is fun. Good use of the Go controller, although I'd love there to be a deadzone on the touchpad so the snap turn doesn't cause you to move when you don't want to.

I liked this game but I am not sure if I finished it or not due to what I assume are bugs. The most common bug is that some piles of coins can't be collected. The bigger bug though comes in what I think is the final room of the game (or just the 1st level?) after fighting the 'boss-sword'. The treasure room has a deadly chest which can kill you instantly, but if you avoid it and shoot it, eventually it floats up and through the ceiling. Then you can walk around the treasure room, but can't collect or shoot anything. Some objects can be walked through including some barrels in the corner which allow you to fall out of the landscape in to blackness and die.

This needs fixing, and hopefully it was just the end of level 1 and there is more to come, as the game without the bugs would be great.
